prompt:
Scene:
A black studio macro setup with a glossy black tray, invisible high-speed flash, and subtle blue rim light from the back right. The background is pure black with no visible room.

Subject:
A single water droplet impact frozen at the exact crown-splash moment, centered in frame. The crown is symmetrical but natural, with dozens of tiny droplets suspended midair around it.

Important details:
Photorealistic high-speed photography, millionth-of-a-second freeze, macro lens, razor-sharp water surface tension, crisp droplets, black reflective tray, cool blue rim highlights and white flash speculars.

Use case:
First image in a high-speed impact series, establishing lighting and freeze-frame language. Square crop-safe gallery card.

Constraints:
No text, no watermark, no logo, no hands, no extra objects, no colored liquid, no cartoon or CGI look, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio.
title: Water Crown
description: Water Crown freezes a physical impact in a controlled black studio.

generation.runner_notes: No reference image required. Queue can run this image directly from prompt.
